creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-04-20 12:13:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    russian              Makefile 
  Added files:
    russian/fortune-bashorgru Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-install pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This package contains fortune files maked from popular russian site bash.org.ru.
  Also it contains example script to keep your bash.org.ru fortunes up to date.
  
  WWW:    http://bash.org.ru
  
  PR:             ports/111932
  Submitted by:   dindin at dindin.ru
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.87      +1 -0      ports/russian/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/russian/fortune-bashorgru/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/russian/fortune-bashorgru/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/russian/fortune-bashorgru/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/russian/fortune-bashorgru/pkg-install (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/russian/fortune-bashorgru/pkg-plist (new)
